programme.desc: Karen is an entitled middle-aged woman whose demanding nature has alienated her loved ones. After a series of instances displaying her privilege, Karen receives an intervention from some unconventional spirits.

programme.title: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: After losing her job, making out with her soon-to-be ex-boss, and finding out that her daughter plans to spend Thanksgiving with her boyfriend, Claudia Larson has to face spending the holiday with her family.

programme.title: Pieces of April
programme.desc: A head strong young woman, who has alienated her parents is forced to confront their troubled relationship when she learns that her mother, is dying of cancer.

programme.title: Surviving Christmas
programme.desc: A lonely, obnoxious young millionaire pays a family to spend Christmas with him.

programme.title: Little Nicky
programme.desc: When Satan reneges on his plans to retire, two of his three heirs leave Hell to gather enough souls to vote the Prince of Darkness out of office. But Satan sends his youngest—and nicest—son, Little Nicky, to bring the other two home.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Joe Dirt is a janitor with a mullet, acid-washed jeans, and a dream -- to find the parents he lost at the Grand Canyon when he was a belligerent, trailer park-raised kid. Now, the irrepressibly optimistic Joe hits the road in search of his folks.

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks
programme.desc: There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: When firefighter Jake Carson (John Cena) and his team (Keegan-Michael Key & John Leguizamo) rescue three siblings in the path of a wildfire, they realize no amount of training could have prepared them for their most challenging job yet -- babysitting.

programme.title: The 4:30 Movie

programme.title: Whiskey Tango Foxtrot
programme.desc: Stuck in a rut, reporter Kim Baker decides to shake things up by taking a dangerous assignment in Afghanistan. Far from home and completely out of her comfort zone, Kim discovers her true strength as she risks it all to find the next big story.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: Mike and Carol have just one week to come up with $20,000 in back taxes, or they’ll lose their house to a neighbor. Even worse, Marcia gets a swollen nose on date night, Cindy’s addicted to tattling, and Jan’s hearing a psychotic inner voice.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths are on a quest to forge signature blades from various Damascus patterns. A tedious and time-consuming task, only three competitors will be victorious.

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new women arrive at the ranch to fight head to head in Possession, Loaded and Grip & Rip to earn a spot in Steve Austin's Skullbuster and a shot to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new male competitors go through three grueling rounds of competition, including Drag Race, Bagged, and Blowout. One of them will earn the right to take on the Skullbuster, and a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin brings in his toughest group of women yet to compete in Drag Race, Bagged, and Blowout. Only one will earn the right to take on his Skullbuster and a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens put the 'fear' in 'fierce' as they act in a drag horror movie franchise. With guest judges Lena Headey (Game Of Thrones) and Linda Blair (The Exorcist).

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the series, Jane goes undercover in a county jail to uncover details of a double-homicide.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: As Jane is about to testify in a murder trial, she discovers that a key piece of evidence has been stolen. Also, Frankie tries to impress Nina with magic tricks.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A mortician's body is found in a casket at his funeral home and Tommy Rizzoli visits with his son and considers returning to Boston for good. Jane's loved ones react to her news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and Maura work to solve two murders. As everyone prepares for the next chapters of their lives, Jane gets a surprise visit and Maura gets upsetting feedback on her novel.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A dead man is found handcuffed to a bed in his own home, and as the "Bon Voyage" party approaches, everyone makes a video to say goodbye.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Tensions are high as the squad investigates a possible copycat of the Boston Strangler. Jane butts heads with her new boss, Lieutenant Grant (recurring guest star DONNIE WAHLBERG).

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate the death of a young Cape Verdean boy who may have died during an attempted exorcism. Plus, Jane's mother sets her up on a surprise date.

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Elementary
programme.desc: Sherlock and Joan hunt for the accomplice of a murdered blackmailer who targeted families of rape victims.

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Rachel deals with consequences of not knowing who Hazelee's father is. Kiaya visits X'Zayveon in prison. Ashley goes to LA and Bar overreacts. Brianna's patience is tested. Kayla has a reaction when Luke finally makes a decision about school.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley and Bar each take steps to move on. Kayla reaches a breaking point with Stephan. Rachel struggles to fit Drew into Hazelee's life. Brianna wrestles with a decision. Kiaya and Teazha both lose their temper.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla changes Izaiah's last name. Ashley meets up with a friend she's been talking to on social media. Rachel considers birth control. Kiaya agrees to mediation with X'Zayveon's mom. Brianna flirts with the idea of dating again.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla and Luke sit down with Stephan and Madison. Brianna gets Braeson his first tricycle. Ashley is shocked when Bar asks for a paternity test. Rachel deals with Jacob's jealousy. Kiaya considers letting Carla meet the baby.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla is hopeful that Stephan will start showing up for Izaiah. Ashley resolves to co-parent with Bar. Rachel takes a pregnancy test. Kiaya asks Teazha to talk to Amour's father. Brianna looks to the future.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: The guy Brianna's been talking to online makes a move. Ashley reaches a big milestone. Rachel wants her dad to meet her baby. Kayla's mom makes a decision that affects everyone. Kiaya has very high expectations for Teazha's prom.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley's mom tries to make peace with Bar's mom. Kayla is on the fence about her mom's move. Things might be getting serious with Rachel's new boyfriend. Kiaya and Teazha see a couple's counselor. Brianna decides not to take things slow.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla and Luke welcome their daughter Ariah. Brianna's family isn't as excited about her new boyfriend as she is. Kiaya's surprise date doesn't go as planned. Ashley and Bar throw a party for Holly's second birthday. Rachel weighs her options.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Rachel's ex is back. Brianna's relationship takes a surprise turn. Kayla considers going back home. Ashley takes Holly to Los Angeles. Kiaya tries to change Teazha's mind.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kiaya struggles with being single. Kayla and Luke celebrate Izaiah's second birthday. Brianna's ex wants to see her again. Rachel's new relationship is tested. Tensions between Bar and Ashley come to a head.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Rachel attempts to convince her mother that Hazelee's dad, Drew, is really going to rehab this time, only to find out that he was recently arrested. Brianna and her mother can't stop fighting over Brianna's new friend, and Kayla celebrates.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla is skeptical when she gets a surprise phone call from Stephan's mom Annette asking to meet up. A call from Amour's dad in prison triggers Kiaya to consider finally making amends with his mom, Carla.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Things get physical during a heated confrontation between Kayla and Stephan's mom Annette. Kiaya reconciles with Amour's grandmother Carla, but is shocked when she finds out that Amour's father X'zayvon might still have feelings for her.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: While still reeling from her fight with Stephan's mom, Kayla makes a big life decision for Iziah. A sad anniversary for Kiaya brings up some old feelings. And introducing Kayla J! She struggles to co-parent with her best friend.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La camioneta donde viajan Dínora, Fernando y sus rehenes, se atasca en arenas movedizas, tienen que esconderse en el mangle. Carmela y Malcolm huyen con el dinero, pero son capturados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Fernando que revise si traen con ellos el dinero, se dan cuenta del engaño de sus empleados. Dínora cambia la ruta para despistar a la policía y hace que se pierdan más.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se agota en el recorrido por la selva pantanosa, Juan dice que no va a continuar sin ella. Dínora dispara al aire y esto lo escuchan Franco y Óscar, que van tras esa pista.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora admite que están perdidos, no los ha guiado bien, le jura a Fernando que pase lo que pase, Juan no sale con vida, entrada la noche, un animal pica a Dínora. Rosario despierta del coma.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: José María inventa una excusa para explicarle a Valeria lo que pasó, ella le dice a Jorge quién es Marcia y él pide una explicación. Lulú le aconseja a su amiga no creer ciegamente en Belinda.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria discute nuevamente con Francisco, luego se entera por Daniela del mal comportamiento de Belinda. Jorge enfrenta a su padre por dinero y él le revela la verdad sobre su origen.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Carlos sorprende a Zoraida con José María, ella se entera de que está en la calle. Valeria habla de sus planes con Francisco, luego le dice a Belinda que debe hacerse una prueba de ADN.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria se decepciona con la noticia del investigador privado. Belinda se le insinúa a Pablo y él la confunde con una prostituta. Roberto confirma que será papá y se lo cuenta a Francisco.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Al saber quién es el violador de Gabriela, Alejandro le da una paliza a su hermano. Antonia encubre a Fernando y niega que él sea un violador. La prueba de ADN confirma que David es hijo de Fernando. Antonia lo celebra y usa a Irene contra Gabriela.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro confronta a Gabriela, le muestra el ADN y la acusa de haber sido amante de Fernando. Ella se ahoga en el dolor por la desconfianza del hombre que ama. Julia secuestra a David, que va a parar con Antonia. Ella lo lleva a conocer a su papá.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: David conoce toda la verdad sobre su padre y cómo fue engendrado. El Tigre va a buscar venganza. Gabriela, Alejandro y Antonia lo detienen cuando está a punto de matar a Fernando. La minera amenaza a Antonia para impedir que lleven preso a su padre.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Fernando llega a las afueras de la casa de Gabriela para pedirle perdón. Alejandro escucha todo y comprueba que sí hubo violación. La minera denuncia a Fernando por violación ante el fiscal Villegas, pero un falso testimonio de Irene no la favorece.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Nagano, Japan where Racers take on an Olympic-sized Detour, and one team takes a tumble that may jeopardize their chances in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise in Thailand as one team forgets their fanny pack, putting them behind, and one Racer celebrates the end of the leg when they pop a very special question.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams face a race within the Race when they attempt to navigate the chaotic streets of Bangkok, and Racers eat a traditional delicacy - a "1,000 year old egg."

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers strap on lederhosen for a trip to Oktoberfest in Bavaria, Germany, and one team finds their race in jeopardy after losing their fanny pack.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, the Race travels to Monaco, where one team takes a big risk to gain an edge on the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney finally solve the problem of moonshining in Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to counsel the constantly bickering couple, Fred and Jennie Boone, with mixed results.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy suspects that a traveling record promoter is a con artist and he fears for the townsfolk who invested in his record.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Barney's over-zealousness causes him to become a laughing stock, Andy tactfully arranges for Barney to regain his status.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A nationally known con man becomes a hero to Aunt Bee, Opie and Barney when he is held for two days in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy plays matchmaker for Barney but finds himself in difficulty when Barney misinterprets his efforts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie struggle to keep house when Aunt Bee leaves for a few days.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy finally proposes to Ellie when he becomes convinced that the new young doctor in town is trying to steal his girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Town drunk, Otis Campbell, turns out to be the only living descendant of a Revolutionary War hero, much to the dismay of the mayor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A state inspector learns some unique but effective police methods employed by the Mayberry sheriff.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Ellie give the Cinderella treatment to a farmer's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, faced with the unpleasant duty of serving an eviction notice, discovers a way to save the mortgagee's home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has to deliver a baby for a farmer's wife when the local doctor is unavailable.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl who lost her parents in a fire doesn't speak because she has grown up in a secret telepathic community.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jess-Belle enlists the aid of a local witch who casts a spell that makes Billy-Ben fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2
programme.desc: On December 3rd, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Antonio Margarito in a highly anticipated championship rematch at the Madison Square Garden in New York. This time around, Cotto showed his dominance from the start and stopped Margarito in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Jeff Mayweather faced eachother at the Hilton Hotel in Las Vegas in an 8 round bout then ended by technical knockout in the fourth round securing the victory for De la Hoya.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya 2
programme.desc: On September 13th, 2003 Shane Mosley and Oscar De La Hoya battled for a second time for the IBA, WBA and, WBC Super welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted 12 rounds continuing the reign of Mosley securing his win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Marvin Hagler
programme.desc: On April 6th, 1987 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Marvin Hagler for the WBC World Middleweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a twelve round bout that resulted in a split decision in favor of Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Ruslan Provodnikov
programme.desc: On March 16th, 2013, Timothy Bradley fought Ruslan Provodnikov for the WBO Welterweight Title in Carson, California. Provodnikov put up a very strong challenge in an incredible fight, but Bradley prevailed, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Todd Foster vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On August 6th, 1992 Todd Foster fought Jeff Mayweather at Denton Field in Miles City with Mayweather going down in rounds 7 & 8 the bout resulted in a technical knockout victory for Foster.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Dillian Whyte
programme.desc: On April 23rd, 2022 Tyson Fury fought Dillian Whyte for the WBC World Heavyweight title at Wembley Stadium Whyte suffered injuries throughout the fight causing the fight to end by technical knockout in the 4th round giving the bout to Fury.

programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo

programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.desc: Evelyn and Jen leave Miami to visit basketball fiancée Gloria Govan and Matt Barnes. Also, the girls go to a bust of a party that gets worse when they bump into an alleged groupie that may have been talking to Jen's husband. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Emotions get heated when Gloria defends her sister's role in an alleged scandal involving Shaunie. Suzie, Jen, and Royce make a splash when a second run-in with an alleged groupie turns into a fight on the streets of upscale Miami! Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Suzie's efforts to fix up Evelyn with a local producer crashes with a thud. Evelyn enrolls the girls into a self-defense class. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jen's upcoming Haiti benefit inspires Royce to invite the girls to make a difference at a local soup kitchen. Also, some tender moments with Eric and Jen further clouds her decision to stay married. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie returns to Miami, and galpal Erikka is surprised by lingering feelings with ex-boyfriend and basketball player, Rasual Butler. Also, Evelyn takes her troubles with menacing texts to the next level, hiring a private investigator! Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie gives the girls a break from the Miami heat in her new hometown, Los Angeles. Will Jen decide to stand by her man or send him to the showers? Can Royce and Gloria get over themselves? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn draws the line with Susie over unchecked gossip about a hot weekend in Vegas. Also, Shaunie's attempt to bring Kenny Anderson's ex, Tami, into the circle is met with skepticism. The episode ends with a shocking surprise. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Fallout over Suzie and Evelyn's argument has Suzie on the run to an unexpected source….GLORIA! Also, Tami reintroduces her daughters to father Kenny Anderson after many years apart. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie and the ladies launch a surprise ambush on Gloria to find out why her wedding was called off. Jen and Eric finally have "the talk" that will alter the course of their relationship forever. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: When Evelyn and Jen find themselves left off the guest list of a posh fundraiser thrown by circle outsider Ashley Walker, they decide to crash the event. Tempers flare when Tami and Jen get into it over an innocuous remark. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn and Jen regret volunteering to help Royce and her man Dwayne with a fashion fundraiser. Also, Tami has some surgery done, helping her to lose pounds and setting the stage to gain a friend. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn is back on the dating scene with a date that ends with a miss…and then one with a kiss. The tension between Jen & Eric reaches a new mark. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie's surprise announcement of a trip abroad delays Evelyn's connection with flirtatious football icon Chad Ochocinco. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The ladies' trip to Madrid suffers from both Royce's phantom illness and Tami's sudden mood swings. Jen also finds a romantic mark and the women get piggish on the local cuisine. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jen & Ev accuse Royce of playing both sides by also being friends with outsiders Suzie & Ashley. Additionally, Ashley Walker and player Rafer Alston ambush Jen & Ev to prove that they are, in fact, a genuine item. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn's weekend in Cincinnati with Chad Ochocinco could just be the start of something big. The shocking final act disclosure of a past infidelity links two of the wives and ends the season with an explosive showdown. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin rides upon a man named Stryker hanging from a tree. When he learns Paladin is after the same man but with a warrant, he says he has stronger reasons and hopes he won't get in his way.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Repaying a debt, Paladin rides to Valley Heart. Sheriff Reagan awaits the return of a native son who has been jailed for the past six years.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is after a man suspected of killing a marshal. After finally capturing him in the desert he claims his innocence.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Hogtooth gets more ridicule than usual, when 3 gunmen take over the town, after cleaning it up. Each was hired in secret by a town council member, so the enforcers band together to suck Hogtooth dry.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Sweetwater was a wild town before Thomas Carey, a retired Army scout and old friend of Paladin, became marshal. But Carey has taken over complete control and turned into a killer.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin rides to the San Luis Rey church in search of a very old brandy. When he is asked by the Padre to retrieve a statue of worship, they strike a bargain where they both may get what they want.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: A doctor who once saved Paladin's life calls upon him to find and safely bring back the son of a one-time sweetheart.The young man has "taken to the hills" to track down his father's killer.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin meets a drunken Col Lacey at the Carlton. He is there fearful of going home to his lovely wife after being away for some time seeking his fortune.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Frank Callaway wins acquittal for a client and then escapes death at the hands of the two men who tried to frame his client. Sheriff Hollister captures the killer but no lawyer will accept the defense; so Callaway himself volunteers.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The World's Fastest Gun,' Billy Denver, comes to Tombstone to perform. Challenged by Johnny's Pearce, he faces his first human target - and kills him. When Johnny's brother hears the news, he heads for Tombstone to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Elias Ransome brings his band of religious emigrants to the outskirts of Tombstone, but a prejudiced rancher stirs up agitation against the newcomers, leading to an air of intolerance. Hollister and Clabourne must step in to resolve the situation.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A gunslinger en route to Durango seeks Doc Holliday to gun him down for the murder of his brother. Passing through Tombstone, he becomes the enemy of two of the West's slickest draws -- Sheriff Hollister and the infamous dentist-turned-gunman.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A handsome cowboy makes eyes at an immigrant miner's pretty daughter and upsets her staid European ideals. Betrothed by her father to a young miner, she forsakes him and her old-world traditions by leaving home to become an 'American lady.'

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: George and Patricia Camden, two people out of rancher Aaron McClain's shady past, blackmail him. Aided by a mysterious accomplice, McClain evens the score by murdering George, and Sheriff Hollister is plunged into a dangerous manhunt.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Old Man Clinton forces Bill Doolin - just out of prison - into an attempt to kill Sheriff Clay Hollister as Clay is the only witness against his two renegade sons. Dooline picks a fight with Clay who risks his life to get to the bottom of the plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Julie Dixon takes a job as a dealer in Tombstone's Saloon. Here, she deals a grim hand of vengeance. Her brother Sam, an incurable gambler, had killed Julie's lover six months before. She has taken the job as part of a plan to wreak revenge on Sam.

programme.title: Swamp People

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Prepare for a feathered fight when Téa squares off against Big 2 Crump's Nightmare Penguin where the loser will be trapped forever in a block of ice!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa's body turns more and more into a giant popsicle, can she keep her brain from freezing to find a way to melt Big 2's strategy? Or will Big 2's penguin horde waddle all over her?

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, Freddie, and Spencer go to Japan for the “iWeb Awards”. Kyoko and Yuki, their competition, have their cousins trap Spencer and Mrs. Benson, while they leave Carly, Sam, and Freddie in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer tries to surprise Carly for her birthday and ends up burning down her bedroom instead. But when the insurance company hands him a big check, he has a chance to make it up to her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After an iCarly fan proposes to his girlfriend live on the web show, the gang gets roped into going to the wedding. But when the bride gets cold feet, Carly must come to the rescue.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang goes into business making and selling Penny-Tees. After sales go through the roof, Sam recruits 4th-graders to help make shirts. But Carly, Sam, & Freddie disagree about how to treat them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Ridiculed for never pulling a prank, Carly recruits Spencer's help to prank Sam and Freddie. But after Spencer gets a taste for it, he can't stop pranking. The gang must figure out how to stop him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After fighting with her mom, Sam moves in with Carly, who soon realizes she's a horrible guest. Freddie is stalked by a dangerous criminal after catching him on video committing a crime.

programme.title: iCarly

programme.desc: Sam tries to get revenge on Cat by befriending Robbie; Dice wins a tank of man-eating tuna fish in a poker game.

programme.title: Sam & Cat

programme.title: Sam & Cat

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: The gang must rescue Cat when she is trapped inside of one of Dice's magic tricks.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
